items.message:
chore: merge main and regenerate pnpm-lock.yaml

Merged latest main (upstream) into the PR branch and confirmed
pnpm-lock.yaml is up to date with no conflicts.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

items.body:
## pnpm-lock.yaml conflict resolved ✅

The `pnpm-lock.yaml` merge conflict has been resolved in commit `3937fa57e`.

**What was done:**
1. Fetched latest `main` from upstream
2. Merged `main` into the PR branch — the merge completed without conflicts (git auto-merged `pnpm-lock.yaml` cleanly)
3. Verified `pnpm-lock.yaml` matches upstream `main` exactly (the PR only adds `.github` workflow files with no new npm dependencies)
4. Pushed the merge commit to the PR branch
